_meta.description: Symptom catalog derived from 72 FM MASTER cards (216 P-conditions)

symptoms.threshold: IR <50 MΩ → schedule rewinding within 30 days; IR <1 MΩ/kV → do not energize
IR <50 MΩ → schedule rewinding within 30 days; IR <1 MΩ/kV → do not energize
IR <50 MΩ → schedule rewinding within 30 days; IR <1 MΩ/kV → do not energize
ΔP 2–3× baseline → clean within 2 weeks; ΔP >3× baseline → replace/clean immediately
ΔP 2–3× baseline → clean within 2 weeks; ΔP >3× baseline → replace/clean immediately
ΔP 2–3× baseline → clean within 2 weeks; ΔP >3× baseline → replace/clean immediately

symptoms.description: Sudden step-change ΔP increase (>100% in minutes)
symptoms.threshold: Sudden ΔP >100% of baseline → clear blockage at next safe opportunity; >2 events/month → investigate upstream screening
Sudden ΔP >100% of baseline → clear blockage at next safe opportunity; >2 events/month → investigate upstream screening
Sudden ΔP >100% of baseline → clear blockage at next safe opportunity; >2 events/month → investigate upstream screening
Velocity <1.0×Vc for >30 min → initiate water flush; complete blockage → do NOT increase pump pressure (rupture risk)

symptoms.description: increasing pipeline ΔP at constant flow
symptoms.threshold: Velocity <1.0×Vc for >30 min → initiate water flush; complete blockage → do NOT increase pump pressure (rupture risk)

symptoms.description: density meter showing lower solids at discharge vs inlet
symptoms.threshold: Velocity <1.0×Vc for >30 min → initiate water flush; complete blockage → do NOT increase pump pressure (rupture risk)

symptoms.description: Surface cracks detectable by MPI/DPI at stress concentrations
symptoms.threshold: Crack <25% section → monitor quarterly; 25–50% → repair within 30 days; >50% or >1 mm/month growth → remove from service immediately
Crack <25% section → monitor quarterly; 25–50% → repair within 30 days; >50% or >1 mm/month growth → remove from service immediately
Crack <25% section → monitor quarterly; 25–50% → repair within 30 days; >50% or >1 mm/month growth → remove from service immediately
Section loss >30% → de-rate and plan replacement; visible plastic deformation → reduce load, repair within 30 days

symptoms.description: section loss from corrosion reducing safety factor
symptoms.threshold: Section loss >30% → de-rate and plan replacement; visible plastic deformation → reduce load, repair within 30 days
Section loss >30% → de-rate and plan replacement; visible plastic deformation → reduce load, repair within 30 days
Shell temp >350°C (carbon steel) → reduce firing, plan refractory repair; >400°C or cherry-red → reduce firing immediately, emergency repair
Shell temp >350°C (carbon steel) → reduce firing, plan refractory repair; >400°C or cherry-red → reduce firing immediately, emergency repair
Shell temp >350°C (carbon steel) → reduce firing, plan refractory repair; >400°C or cherry-red → reduce firing immediately, emergency repair
Shell temp >350°C (carbon steel) → reduce firing, plan refractory repair; >400°C or cherry-red → reduce firing immediately, emergency repair
Shell temp >350°C (carbon steel) → reduce firing, plan refractory repair; >400°C or cherry-red → reduce firing immediately, emergency repair

symptoms.description: Black FeS deposits under tubercles (H₂S odor)
symptoms.threshold: Planktonic >10⁴ CFU/mL → review biocide program; sessile >10⁵ CFU/cm² → mechanical cleaning required

symptoms.description: localized hemispherical pitting at 6 o'clock in horizontal pipes
symptoms.threshold: Planktonic >10⁴ CFU/mL → review biocide program; sessile >10⁵ CFU/cm² → mechanical cleaning required
Planktonic >10⁴ CFU/mL → review biocide program; sessile >10⁵ CFU/cm² → mechanical cleaning required

symptoms.description: Progressive wall thinning by UT (uniform loss pattern)
symptoms.threshold: Corrosion rate >design allowance → investigate root cause; lining holiday detected → repair within 30 days
Corrosion rate >design allowance → investigate root cause; lining holiday detected → repair within 30 days

symptoms.description: corrosion coupon weight loss >2× design rate
symptoms.threshold: Corrosion rate >design allowance → investigate root cause; lining holiday detected → repair within 30 days

symptoms.description: Visible rust and paint degradation (ASTM D714 blistering
symptoms.threshold: Coating <rating 6 per ASTM D610 → plan spot repair; structural section loss >10% → immediate de-rate
Coating <rating 6 per ASTM D610 → plan spot repair; structural section loss >10% → immediate de-rate
Coating <rating 6 per ASTM D610 → plan spot repair; structural section loss >10% → immediate de-rate
Coating <rating 6 per ASTM D610 → plan spot repair; structural section loss >10% → immediate de-rate

symptoms.description: Gasket face staining/seepage at outer crevice edge
symptoms.cbm_technique: UT thickness at flange faces and gasket lines
symptoms.threshold: Crevice pitting >1 mm on flange face → engineer assessment; flange finish must be restored to ≤6.3 μm Ra per ASME B16.5

symptoms.description: weeping at flanged joints, under-deposit hemispherical pitting visible after cleaning
symptoms.cbm_technique: UT thickness at flange faces and gasket lines
symptoms.threshold: Crevice pitting >1 mm on flange face → engineer assessment; flange finish must be restored to ≤6.3 μm Ra per ASME B16.5

symptoms.description: Accelerated corrosion of less noble metal at junction with clean noble metal adjacent
symptoms.cbm_technique: UT thickness at dissimilar metal junctions
symptoms.threshold: Wall thinning >20% at junction → install insulating gasket kit per NACE SP0286; galvanic rate >2× general rate → redesign junction

symptoms.description: distinctive wall thinning within 1–5 pipe diameters of junction
symptoms.cbm_technique: UT thickness at dissimilar metal junctions
symptoms.threshold: Wall thinning >20% at junction → install insulating gasket kit per NACE SP0286; galvanic rate >2× general rate → redesign junction

symptoms.cbm_technique: UT thickness at dissimilar metal junctions
symptoms.threshold: Wall thinning >20% at junction → install insulating gasket kit per NACE SP0286; galvanic rate >2× general rate → redesign junction

symptoms.description: Progressive surface rust (orange to lamellar scaling to deep pitting)
symptoms.cbm_technique: Visual coating and corrosion condition assessment
symptoms.threshold: Coating <5 per ASTM D610 or adhesion <2.0 MPa → plan full recoating at next shutdown

symptoms.cbm_technique: Visual coating and corrosion condition assessment
symptoms.threshold: Coating <5 per ASTM D610 or adhesion <2.0 MPa → plan full recoating at next shutdown

symptoms.description: galvanized white rust with red rust breakthrough
symptoms.cbm_technique: Visual coating and corrosion condition assessment
symptoms.threshold: Coating <5 per ASTM D610 or adhesion <2.0 MPa → plan full recoating at next shutdown
Tube metal temp >max allowable per API 530 → clean deposits or upgrade alloy; vanadium >50 ppm in fuel ash → add Mg-based additive

symptoms.description: tube metal temperature trending upward, vanadium-rich deposit accumulation (green/black)
symptoms.threshold: Tube metal temp >max allowable per API 530 → clean deposits or upgrade alloy; vanadium >50 ppm in fuel ash → add Mg-based additive

symptoms.description: Progressive oxide scale with spallation (rough pitted surface), steam-side oxide exfoliation detected by tube temperature increase
symptoms.threshold: Steam-side oxide >500 μm → plan chemical cleaning; high-temp bolt torque loss >20% → re-torque using hot-bolting procedure

symptoms.description: bolt torque relaxation from thread oxidation
symptoms.threshold: Steam-side oxide >500 μm → plan chemical cleaning; high-temp bolt torque loss >20% → re-torque using hot-bolting procedure

symptoms.description: Intergranular cracking at galvanized weld HAZ (MPI/DPI post-weld)
symptoms.cbm_technique: MPI/DPI at welds on galvanized structures (post-weld)
symptoms.threshold: Any LME crack at galvanized weld → stop operation, grind out completely, remove all zinc 100 mm around weld, re-weld and inspect

symptoms.description: sudden brittle fracture of galvanized high-strength bolt during/after tightening
symptoms.cbm_technique: MPI/DPI at welds on galvanized structures (post-weld)
symptoms.threshold: Any LME crack at galvanized weld → stop operation, grind out completely, remove all zinc 100 mm around weld, re-weld and inspect

symptoms.cbm_technique: MPI/DPI at welds on galvanized structures (post-weld)
symptoms.threshold: Any LME crack at galvanized weld → stop operation, grind out completely, remove all zinc 100 mm around weld, re-weld and inspect

symptoms.description: Elevated temperature at connections (IR thermography ΔT >10°C), discolored/oxidized surfaces (greenish-blue Cu
symptoms.threshold: ΔT >70°C (NETA "Deficiency") → de-energize and repair immediately — risk of thermal runaway and fire
ΔT >70°C (NETA "Deficiency") → de-energize and repair immediately — risk of thermal runaway and fire
ΔT >70°C (NETA "Deficiency") → de-energize and repair immediately — risk of thermal runaway and fire

symptoms.description: Localized deep pitting at discrete points on buried piping, pipe-to-soil potential positive shifts near foreign CP systems
symptoms.threshold: Pipe-to-soil positive shift → investigate stray current source, install drainage bond; AC voltage >15V → install AC mitigation per NACE SP21424
Pipe-to-soil positive shift → investigate stray current source, install drainage bond; AC voltage >15V → install AC mitigation per NACE SP21424

symptoms.description: Surface cracks by DPI/MPI at welds and stress concentrations
symptoms.threshold: SCC crack in stainless steel → assess by UT, plan repair (sudden failure possible); elastomer hardness >15% above spec → replace immediately
SCC crack in stainless steel → assess by UT, plan repair (sudden failure possible); elastomer hardness >15% above spec → replace immediately
SCC crack in stainless steel → assess by UT, plan repair (sudden failure possible); elastomer hardness >15% above spec → replace immediately

symptoms.description: Surface cracks by MPI/DPI/eddy current at fatigue-prone locations
symptoms.threshold: Crack >25% of section or growth exceeding prediction → remove from service (sudden fracture risk)

symptoms.description: measurable crack growth between NDE inspections
symptoms.threshold: Crack >25% of section or growth exceeding prediction → remove from service (sudden fracture risk)
Crack >25% of section or growth exceeding prediction → remove from service (sudden fracture risk)

symptoms.description: Surface thermal checking ("elephant skin" crack network)
symptoms.threshold: Glass lining holiday → repair if <100 cm², reline if larger; sensitization in SS HAZ → solution anneal or replace

symptoms.description: glass lining crack by spark test per NACE SP0188
symptoms.threshold: Glass lining holiday → repair if <100 cm², reline if larger; sensitization in SS HAZ → solution anneal or replace

symptoms.description: metallurgical change by replica metallography or hardness shift
symptoms.threshold: Glass lining holiday → repair if <100 cm², reline if larger; sensitization in SS HAZ → solution anneal or replace

symptoms.description: SCC branching crack patterns by DPI (highly branched dendritic)
